evals.name: audit-form-page
evals.prompt: Audit the attached page-with-faults.html for usability and accessibility problems. For each issue return a severity, the location, and a concrete fix. Save your findings to the outputs directory.
planted_faults: email input has no associated label (WCAG 1.3.1/4.1.2)
assertions: findings are structured with severity AND a concrete fix

evals.name: audit-card-page
evals.prompt: Audit the attached page-card.html for usability and accessibility problems. For each issue return a severity, the location, and a concrete fix. Save your findings to the outputs directory.
planted_faults: icon-only button with empty accessible name (WCAG 4.1.2)
search field uses placeholder instead of a label (WCAG 1.3.1)
data table has no header cells (WCAG 1.3.1)
assertions: flags the icon button missing an accessible name
findings are structured with severity AND a concrete fix
